fields.name: ENABLE
fields.description: Enables normal controller operation and scratchpad access sequencing.

fields.name: SOFT_RESET
fields.description: Software-requested reset indication. The controller may self-clear this bit after sampling or treat it as a sticky request depending on implementation, but reset behavior must still clear all software-visible state.

fields.name: IRQ_ENABLE
fields.description: Enables irq assertion when latched BIST done/fail status is present.

fields.name: ready
fields.description: Indicates controller is ready for firmware access and not busy with BIST sequencing.

fields.name: bist_done
fields.description: Latched BIST completion indication.

fields.name: bist_fail
fields.description: Latched BIST failure indication.

fields.name: busy
fields.description: Indicates the controller is busy with BIST-related sequencing or status processing.

fields.name: ADDR
fields.description: Memory address for scratchpad accesses, covering 256 words.

fields.name: WDATA
fields.description: Write data byte 0, least-significant byte of the 32-bit word.

fields.name: WDATA
fields.description: Write data byte 1.

fields.name: WDATA
fields.description: Write data byte 2.

registers.name: MEM_WDATA3
registers.description: Scratchpad memory write data byte 3, most-significant byte of the 32-bit word.

fields.name: WDATA
fields.description: Write data byte 3.

fields.name: RDATA
fields.description: Read data byte 0, least-significant byte of the 32-bit word.

fields.name: RDATA
fields.description: Read data byte 1.

fields.name: RDATA
fields.description: Read data byte 2.

registers.name: MEM_RDATA3
registers.description: Scratchpad memory read data byte 3, most-significant byte of the 32-bit word.

fields.name: RDATA
fields.description: Read data byte 3.

fields.name: MEM_WRITE
fields.description: Request a write to the memory address in MEM_ADDR using MEM_WDATA.

fields.name: MEM_READ
fields.description: Request a read from the memory address in MEM_ADDR and update MEM_RDATA.

registers.name: BIST_CONTROL
registers.description: BIST request and result-clear control register.

fields.name: START
fields.description: Requests BIST start. May be combined with the external bist_start input.

fields.name: CLEAR_RESULT
fields.description: Clears latched BIST result state and corresponding IRQ status bits.

fields.name: done
fields.description: Latched BIST completion flag.

fields.name: fail
fields.description: Latched BIST failure flag.

fields.name: running
fields.description: Indicates a BIST operation is running or in-progress.

fields.name: last_fail_addr
fields.description: Upper five bits of the last failing address if only one byte is exposed per register byte lane; full 8-bit address is covered by this register and adjacent byte-split exposure below.

registers.name: BIST_LAST_FAIL_ADDR
registers.description: BIST last failing address byte register.

fields.name: LAST_FAIL_ADDR
fields.description: Full 8-bit last failing memory address.

fields.name: bist_done
fields.description: Latched interrupt status for BIST done.

fields.name: bist_fail
fields.description: Latched interrupt status for BIST fail.

registers.name: IRQ_CLEAR
registers.description: Write-one-to-clear register for interrupt status bits.

fields.name: bist_done
fields.description: Write 1 to clear bist_done interrupt status.

fields.name: bist_fail
fields.description: Write 1 to clear bist_fail interrupt status.
